achievements.title: Foot in the Door
achievements.description: Defeat Henry in the first race in Los Angeles.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: The World Is Your Oyster
achievements.description: Defeat Trevor and gain access to open city races in Los Angeles.

achievements.title: Navigator
achievements.description: Earn 200 reputation in Los Angeles.

achievements.description: Earn 500 reputation in Los Angeles and unlock Class C vehicles.

achievements.description: Earn 1,200 reputation in Los Angeles and unlock new performance upgrades.

achievements.title: Legend
achievements.description: Earn 20,000 reputation in Los Angeles and the highest street racer rank.

achievements.title: On the Line
achievements.description: Win the Bird on the Line series and a 1969 Camaro RS SS.

achievements.description: Win the Cool Breeze series and a 2004 SVT Focus.

achievements.description: Defeat the three Los Angeles district champions.

achievements.title: King of the Hills
achievements.description: Defeat the Los Angeles city champion.

achievements.title: Jacked
achievements.description: Win six races with a muscle car in Los Angeles.

achievements.title: The Lap of Luxury
achievements.description: Win six races with a luxury sedan in Los Angeles.

achievements.description: Win six races with a motorcycle in Los Angeles.

achievements.title: Members Only
achievements.description: Win six races with an exotic in Los Angeles.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Baconator
achievements.description: Unlock the LA cop car.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.description: Defeat Aito in your first race in Tokyo.

achievements.title: Elite Racer
achievements.description: Earn 300 reputation in Tokyo.

achievements.description: Earn 1,000 reputation in Tokyo.

achievements.description: Earn 4,000 reputation in Tokyo.

achievements.title: Idol
achievements.description: Earn 7,500 reputation in Tokyo.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.description: Defeat Junichi and win a 1969 Boss 302.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Apex Predator
achievements.description: Win the Ginza Tournament series and a 2006 Solstice.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Mr. Universe
achievements.description: Defeat Junichi and win a Camaro Concept "DUB Edition".
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Try Hard
achievements.description: Win the Tryout Tournament series and a 1999 Skyline GT-R V-Spec.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Rolling in Style
achievements.description: Defeat Rin and win a 2007 Mercedes-Benz SL65 AMG.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: King of the Road
achievements.description: Defeat Toshi and win a 2006 Lamborghini Murcielago Roadster "DUB Edition".

achievements.title: Dawn of a New Era
achievements.description: Defeat the leader of the Midnight Club.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Beekonator
achievements.description: Unlock the Tokyo cop car.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Barrels of Fun
achievements.description: Collect a Rockstar barrel.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Trash Collector
achievements.description: Collect 10 Rockstar barrels in Los Angeles.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Garbage Master
achievements.description: Collect all 20 Rockstar barrels in Los Angeles.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Gomi Shushu Hito
achievements.description: Collect 10 Rockstar barrels in Tokyo.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Gomimasuta
achievements.description: Collect all 20 Rockstar barrels in Tokyo.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Swift Justice
achievements.description: Complete a Payback mission in less than one minute.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Slow and Steady
achievements.description: Complete a Payback mission without using a nitro.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Express Delivery
achievements.description: Complete a delivery mission with more than 10 seconds remaining.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Zoned In
achievements.description: Spend 30 seconds in the Zone during a race and win.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Chambered Round
achievements.description: Retain a slip stream turbo charge for 10 seconds.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Loud and Proud
achievements.description: Use Roar 10 times in a race and win.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Bat Out of Hell
achievements.description: Use a slip stream turbo within the first five seconds of a race.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Pushy Driver
achievements.description: Hit 15 vehicles with Agro in a race and win.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Fly Like a Bird
achievements.description: Stay airborne for more than three seconds.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Making Bank
achievements.description: Accumulate $250,000 in assets in Los Angeles.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Yen Pincher
achievements.description: Accumulate $250,000 in assets in Tokyo.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Breaking the Ginko
achievements.description: Accumulate $500,000 in assets in Tokyo.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Warp Drive
achievements.description: Drive 275 mph or faster.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: An Irresistible Force Meets a Movable Object
achievements.description: Hit a vehicle while using Agro while driving faster than 200 mph.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Don't Blink
achievements.description: During a race, pass another racer while driving at least 225 mph.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Gutter Runner
achievements.description: While cruising in Los Angeles, travel from the north end of the flood control channel to the south end in less than 30 seconds.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Rail Runner
achievements.description: While cruising in Tokyo, travel from the east end of the elevated train platform to the west end in less than 30 seconds.
achievements.author: suspect15

achievements.title: Bottom of the Barrels
achievements.description: Collect all 20 Rockstar barrels in Los Angeles within 4 minutes and 15 seconds with one of the first three starter cars.
achievements.author: suspect15
